mekanism.constants.mekanism.recipe_warning: Broken tags in Mekanism recipes detected, please check server logs for details. You will be missing some recipes and machines may not accept expected inputs.
mekanism.death.attack.mekanism.laser.player: %1$s was incinerated whilst trying to escape %2$s.
mekanism.death.attack.mekanism.radiation.player: %1$s was killed by radiation poisoning whilst trying to escape %2$s.
mekanism.death.attack.mekanism.sps: %1$s was supercritically phase shifted into the next life.
mekanism.death.attack.mekanism.sps.player: %1$s was supercritically phase shifted into the next life whilst trying to escape %2$s. Guess they succeeded in escaping.
mekanism.description.mekanism.antiprotonic_nucleo: A machine which uses bits of antimatter and mass amounts of energy to atomically transmute various resources.
mekanism.description.mekanism.attack_amplificatio: Amplifies melee attacks on players or mobs.
mekanism.description.mekanism.bin: A block used to store large quantities of a single type of item.
mekanism.description.mekanism.blasting_unit: Uses controlled explosions to destroy nearby blocks in the target plane.
mekanism.description.mekanism.boiler_casing: A pressure-resistant, dense casing used in the creation of a Thermoelectric Boiler multiblock.
mekanism.description.mekanism.boiler_valve: A valve that can be placed on a Thermoelectric Boiler multiblock, allowing for the insertion of energy and water along with the extraction of produced steam.
mekanism.description.mekanism.cable: A simple way of distributing energy throughout a transmitter network.
mekanism.description.mekanism.charge_distribution: Evenly distributes charge throughout all worn MekaSuit armor.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chargepad: A universal chargepad that can charge any energized item from any mod.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_crystalliz: An ultimate machine used to crystallize purified ore slurry into ore crystals.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_dissolutio: An ultimate machine used to chemically dissolve all impurities of an ore, leaving an unprocessed slurry behind.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_infuser: A machine that produces a new chemicals by infusing two others.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_injection_: An elite machine capable of processing ores into four shards, serving as the initial stage of 400% ore processing.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_oxidizer: A machine capable of oxidizing solid materials into gas phase.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_tank: A portable tank that lets you carry chemicals wherever you please.
mekanism.description.mekanism.chemical_washer: An ultimate machine that cleans unprocessed slurry and prepares it for crystallization.
mekanism.description.mekanism.color_modulation_un: Uses advanced holographic projectors to modulate the perceived color of the MekaSuit.
mekanism.description.mekanism.combiner: A machine used to combine items together. For example, raw ores and cobblestone to form their ore counterparts.
mekanism.description.mekanism.conductor: A simple way of transferring heat from one location to another.
mekanism.description.mekanism.crusher: A machine used to crush ingots into their dust counterparts, as well as perform many other operations.
mekanism.description.mekanism.dictionary: A tool used for viewing the tags of various components such as: items, blocks, and fluids.
mekanism.description.mekanism.digital_miner: A highly-advanced, filter-based, auto-miner that can mine whatever block you tell it to within a 32 block (max) radius.
mekanism.description.mekanism.dimensional_stabili: A machine that prevents areas of the world from disappearing when not observed.
mekanism.description.mekanism.dosimeter_unit: Displays the user's current radiation dose in the HUD.
mekanism.description.mekanism.dynamic_tank: The casing used in the Dynamic Tank multiblock, a structure capable of storing great amounts of fluid and chemicals.
mekanism.description.mekanism.dynamic_valve: A valve that can be placed on a Dynamic Tank multiblock, allowing for fluids and chemicals to be inserted and extracted via external piping.
mekanism.description.mekanism.electric_pump: An advanced, upgradeable pump, capable of extracting any type of fluid.
mekanism.description.mekanism.electrolytic_breath: Uses electrolysis to create breathable oxygen from water. Will also fill a jetpack module with hydrogen when necessary.
mekanism.description.mekanism.electrolytic_separa: A machine that uses the process of electrolysis to split apart a certain fluid into two different chemicals.
mekanism.description.mekanism.elytra_unit: Applies an HDPE Reinforced Elytra to the MekaSuit.
mekanism.description.mekanism.energized_smelter: A simple machine that serves as a Mekanism-based furnace that runs off of energy.
mekanism.description.mekanism.energy_cube: An advanced device for storing and distributing energy.
mekanism.description.mekanism.enrichment_chamber: A simple machine used to enrich ores into two of their dust counterparts, as well as perform many other operations.
mekanism.description.mekanism.excavation_escalati: Increases digging speed on any block.
mekanism.description.mekanism.factory: A machine that serves as an upgrade to regular machinery, allowing for multiple processing operations to occur at once.
mekanism.description.mekanism.farming_unit: Allows for soil tilling, log stripping, and soil flattening.
mekanism.description.mekanism.fluid_tank: A handy, sturdy, portable tank that lets you carry multiple buckets of fluid wherever you please. Also doubles as a bucket!
mekanism.description.mekanism.fluidic_plenisher: A machine that is capable of creating entire lakes by filling ravines with fluids.
mekanism.description.mekanism.fluorite_ore: A mineral found relatively deep under the world's surface. The crystals can be processed into Hydrofluoric Acid, an essential chemical for Uranium processing.
mekanism.description.mekanism.formulaic_assemblic: A machine that uses energy to rapidly craft items and blocks from Crafting Formulas. Doubles as an advanced crafting bench.
mekanism.description.mekanism.frost_walker_unit: Uses liquid hydrogen to freeze any water the player walks on. Install multiple for a greater range.
mekanism.description.mekanism.fuelwood_heater: A machine that is capable of producing large quantities of heat energy by burning combustible items.
mekanism.description.mekanism.geiger_unit: Displays the ambient radiation level in the HUD.
mekanism.description.mekanism.gravitational_modul: Using experimental technologies and the tremendous energy of antimatter, allows the user to defy gravity.
mekanism.description.mekanism.gyroscopic_stabiliz: Allows the user to act as though they are on solid ground.
mekanism.description.mekanism.hydraulic_propulsio: Allows the user to both step and jump higher.
mekanism.description.mekanism.hydrostatic_repulso: Uses advanced technology to repel water, lowering the resistance felt while moving through it.
mekanism.description.mekanism.induction_casing: A type of energy-resistant casing used in the creation of an Energized Induction Matrix multiblock.
mekanism.description.mekanism.induction_cell: A highly conductive energy capacitor capable of storing massive amounts of energy in a single block. Housed in an Energized Induction Matrix to expand the multiblock's energy storage.
mekanism.description.mekanism.induction_port: A port that can be placed on an Energized Induction Matrix multiblock, allowing for energy to be inserted from and output to external cabling.
mekanism.description.mekanism.induction_provider: An advanced complex of coolant systems, conductors and transformers capable of expanding the Energized Induction Matrix's maximum rate of energy transfer.
mekanism.description.mekanism.industrial_alarm: Not just your everyday alarm... this is an 'industrial' alarm!
mekanism.description.mekanism.inhalation_purifica: Applies a miniature electromagnetic field around the breathing apparatus, preventing selected potion effect types.
mekanism.description.mekanism.isotopic_centrifuge: A machine with one single purpose: to spin its contents really, REALLY fast.
mekanism.description.mekanism.jetpack_unit: Applies a hydrogen-fueled jetpack to the MekaSuit.
mekanism.description.mekanism.laser: An advanced form of linear energy transfer that utilizes an extremely collimated beam of light.
mekanism.description.mekanism.laser_amplifier: A block that can be used to merge, redirect and amplify laser beams, with fine controls over when to fire.
mekanism.description.mekanism.laser_dissipation_u: Refracts and safely dissipates lasers that hit any MekaSuit armor piece.
mekanism.description.mekanism.laser_tractor_beam: A block used to merge and redirect laser beams. Collects drops from blocks it has broken.
mekanism.description.mekanism.lead_ore: A somewhat rare metal that is excellent at resisting radioactive particles.
mekanism.description.mekanism.locomotive_boosting: Increases the user's sprinting speed (and jumping distance).
mekanism.description.mekanism.logistical_sorter: A filter-based, advanced sorting machine that can auto-eject specified items out of and into adjacent inventories and Logistical Transporters.
mekanism.description.mekanism.magnetic_attraction: Uses powerful magnets to draw distant items towards the player. Install multiple for a greater range.
mekanism.description.mekanism.metallurgic_infuser: A machine used to infuse various materials into (generally) metals to create metal alloys and other compounds.
mekanism.description.mekanism.modification_statio: An advanced workbench capable of installing and removing modules from modular equipment (i.e. MekaSuit!)
mekanism.description.mekanism.motorized_servo_uni: Uses motorized servos to reduce the strain of sneaking.
mekanism.description.mekanism.nutritional_injecti: Automatically feeds the player Nutritional Paste when hungry.
mekanism.description.mekanism.nutritional_liquifi: A machine that is capable of processing any foods into non-dangerous, easily-digestible Nutritional Paste.
mekanism.description.mekanism.oredictionificator: A machine used to unify and translate between various items and blocks using item tags.
mekanism.description.mekanism.osmium_compressor: A fairly advanced machine used to compress osmium into various dusts in order to create their ingot counterparts.
mekanism.description.mekanism.osmium_ore: A strong mineral that can be found at nearly any height in the world. It is known to have many uses in the construction of machinery.
mekanism.description.mekanism.painting_machine: A machine used to color blocks and items via a careful application of a stored pigment.
mekanism.description.mekanism.personal_barrel: A 54-slot barrel that can be opened anywhere- even from your own inventory.
mekanism.description.mekanism.personal_chest: A 54-slot chest that can be opened from your own inventory.
mekanism.description.mekanism.pigment_extractor: A machine used to extract pigments from blocks and items.
mekanism.description.mekanism.pigment_mixer: A sturdy machine capable of mixing two pigments together to produce a new pigment.
mekanism.description.mekanism.pipe: A simple way of distributing fluids throughout a transmitter network.
mekanism.description.mekanism.precision_sawmill: A machine used to process logs and other wood-based items more efficiently, as well as to obtain sawdust.
mekanism.description.mekanism.pressure_disperser: A block used to disperse steam throughout a multiblock structure. These should form a gapless, horizontal plane in order to properly control steam flow.
mekanism.description.mekanism.pressurized_reactio: An advanced machine that processes a solid, liquid and chemical mixture and creates both a chemical and solid product.
mekanism.description.mekanism.purification_chambe: An advanced machine capable of processing ores into three clumps, serving as the initial stage of 300% ore processing.
mekanism.description.mekanism.qio_dashboard: A placeable monitor used to access an Quantum Item Orchestration system's contents.
mekanism.description.mekanism.qio_drive_array: The foundation of any Quantum Item Orchestration system. QIO Drives are stored here.
mekanism.description.mekanism.qio_exporter: A QIO-linked item export unit. Place on a block and export contents from your QIO system to the block.
mekanism.description.mekanism.qio_importer: A QIO-linked item import unit. Place on a block and import its contents to your QIO system.
mekanism.description.mekanism.qio_redstone_adapte: A QIO-linked redstone adapter. Use to monitor your QIO system's contents.
mekanism.description.mekanism.quantum_entanglopor: A highly-advanced block capable of transmitting any practical resource across long distances and dimensions.
mekanism.description.mekanism.radiation_shielding: Provides thick, radiation-proof metal plating to any MekaSuit armor piece.
mekanism.description.mekanism.radioactive_waste_b: A barrel that can be used to 'safely' store radioactive waste. WARNING: breaking this barrel will release its contents into the atmosphere.
mekanism.description.mekanism.resistive_heater: A condensed, coiled resistor capable of converting electrical energy directly into heat energy.
mekanism.description.mekanism.restrictive: - Only used if no other paths available
mekanism.description.mekanism.rotary_condensentra: A machine capable of converting chemicals into their fluid form and vice versa.
mekanism.description.mekanism.security_desk: A central control hub for managing the security of all your owned machinery.
mekanism.description.mekanism.seismic_reader: A portable machine that uses seismic vibrations to provide information on differing layers of the world.
mekanism.description.mekanism.seismic_vibrator: A machine that uses seismic vibrations to provide information on differing layers of the world.
mekanism.description.mekanism.shearing_unit: Allows the creation of energy blades for precise cutting jobs. Does not add laser swords.
mekanism.description.mekanism.silk_touch_unit: Allows all mined blocks to drop as themselves.
mekanism.description.mekanism.solar_neutron_activ: A machine that directs the neutron radiation of the sun into its internal reservoir, allowing for the slow creation of various isotopes.
mekanism.description.mekanism.soul_surfer_unit: Allows the user to surf effortlessly across the top of souls. Install multiple for a greater speed.
mekanism.description.mekanism.sps_casing: Reinforced casing capable of resisting intense chemical and thermal effects from phase-shifting reactions.
mekanism.description.mekanism.sps_port: A port used for the transfer of energy and substances in the Supercritical Phase Shifter.
mekanism.description.mekanism.structural_glass: An advanced, reinforced material of glass that drops when broken and can be used in the structure of any applicable multiblock.
mekanism.description.mekanism.supercharged_coil: Used in Supercritical Phase Shifter multiblock to supply large quantities of energy. Must be attached to a SPS Port.
mekanism.description.mekanism.superheating_elemen: A modular, somewhat dangerous radiator that is capable of emitting massive amounts of heat to its surroundings.
mekanism.description.mekanism.teleportation_unit: Provides for quick travel to nearby blocks.
mekanism.description.mekanism.teleporter: A machine capable of teleporting players to various locations defined by another teleporter.
mekanism.description.mekanism.teleporter_frame: The frame used to construct the Teleporter multiblock, allowing a portal to be generated within the structure.
mekanism.description.mekanism.thermal_evaporation: A copper-alloyed casing used in the structure of a Thermal Evaporation Plant, using its advanced material to conduct the great amounts of heat necessary for processing.
The controller for a Thermal Evaporation Plant, acting as the master block of the structure. Only one of these should be placed on a multiblock.
A valve that can be placed on a Thermal Evaporation Plant multiblock, allowing for fluids to be inserted and extracted via external piping.
mekanism.description.mekanism.tin_ore: A lightweight, yet sturdy, conductive material.
mekanism.description.mekanism.transporter: A simple way of transporting items along the transmitter network.
mekanism.description.mekanism.tube: A simple way of distributing chemicals throughout a transmitter network.
mekanism.description.mekanism.uranium_ore: A common, heavy metal, which can yield massive amounts of energy when properly processed. In its naturally-occurring form, it is not radioactive enough to cause harm.
mekanism.description.mekanism.vein_mining_unit: Allows for quick mining of ore deposits and rapid felling of trees.
mekanism.description.mekanism.vision_enhancement_: Brightens the surrounding environment, allowing the user to see through darkness. Install multiple for more effective night vision.
mekanism.equipment.mekanism.head: Head
mekanism.filter.mekanism.select.title: Create New Filter
mekanism.filter.mekanism.sorter.size_mode.conflic: Size Mode - has no effect currently, because single item mode is turned on.
mekanism.fml.menu.mods.info.description.mekanism: Mekanism is a Minecraft add-on featuring high-tech machinery that can be used to create powerful tools, armor, and weapons.
mekanism.frequency.mekanism.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this frequency? This can't be undone.
mekanism.gui.mekanism.crafting.window.clear: Empty Crafting Window contents into storage, hold shift to empty into player inventory instead.
mekanism.gui.mekanism.issues.filter_has_blacklist: - Filter contains at least one element that is blacklisted
mekanism.gui.mekanism.issues.invalid_oredictionif: - Filter is no longer valid or supported
mekanism.gui.mekanism.issues.no_energy.reduced_ra: - Not enough energy to run at maximum speed

mekanismgenerators.advancements.mekanismgenerators.burn_the: Craft a Gas-Burning Generator to burn Ethene
mekanismgenerators.advancements.mekanismgenerators.heat_gen: Craft a Heat Generator to start making power
mekanismgenerators.advancements.mekanismgenerators.wind_gen: Hopefully there is some wind nearby
mekanismgenerators.configuration.mekanismgenerators.gear.me: Geothermal charging rate in Joules per tick, per degree above ambient, per upgrade installed. This value scales down based on how much of the MekaSuit Pants is submerged. Fire is treated as having a temperature of ~200K above ambient, lava has a temperature of 1,000K above ambient.
Percent of heat damage negated by MekaSuit Pants with maximum geothermal generator units installed. This number scales down linearly based on how many units are actually installed.
Amount of fuel (mB) that each assembly contributes to the fuel and waste capacity. Max = fuelAssemblies * maxFuelPerAssembly
The burn rate increase each fuel assembly provides. Max Burn Rate = fuelAssemblies * burnPerAssembly
The default burn rate of the fission reactor.
The heat capacity added to a Fission Reactor by a single casing block. Increase to require more energy to raise the reactor temperature.
Amount of cooled coolant (mB) that each block of the fission reactor contributes to the volume. Max = volume * cooledCoolantPerTank
Amount of heated coolant (mB) that each block of the fission reactor contributes to the volume. Max = volume * heatedCoolantPerTank
The percentage of waste in a fission reactor's output waste tank that is necessary to trigger the excess waste.
Amount of energy created (in heat) from each whole mB of fission fuel.
The chance of a catastrophic meltdown occurring once the reactor's damage passes 100%. This will linearly scale as damage continues increasing passed 100%.
Percent damage that a reactor will start at after being reconstructed after a meltdown.

Whether catastrophic meltdowns can occur from Fission Reactors. If this is disabled, instead of melting down the reactor will force turn itself off and not be able to be turned back on until the damage level has returned to safe levels.
How much radioactivity of fuel/waste contents are multiplied during a meltdown.
The radius of the explosion that occurs from a meltdown.
Settings for configuring Fission Reactor Meltdowns.
The average surface area of a Fission Reactor's fuel assemblies to reach 100% boil efficiency. Higher values make it harder to cool the reactor.
Amount of energy (Joules) the fusion reactor can store.
Amount of fuel (mB) that the fusion reactor can store.
The fraction of heat from the casing that can be transferred to all sources that are not water. Will impact max heat, heat transfer to thermodynamic conductors, and power generation.
Affects the Injection Rate, Max Temp, and Ignition Temp.
Amount of steam (mB) per injection rate that the fusion reactor can store. Max = injectionRate * steamPerInjection
Amount of water (mB) per injection rate that the fusion reactor can store. Max = injectionRate * waterPerInjection
The fraction of the heat dissipated from the case that is converted to Joules.
The fraction of the heat from the casing that is dissipated to water when water cooling is in use. Will impact max heat, and steam generation.
Energy produced by the Bio Generator in Joules/t.
The capacity in mB of the fluid tank in the Bio Generator.
The capacity in mB of the chemical tank in the Gas-Burning Generator.
The amount of lava in mB that gets consumed to transfer heatGeneration Joules to the Heat Generator.
Multiplier of effectiveness of Lava that is adjacent to the Heat Generator.
Add this amount of Joules to the energy produced by a heat generator if it is in an 'ultrawarm' dimension, in vanilla this is just the Nether.

Amount of energy in Joules the Heat Generator produces per tick. heatGeneration + heatGenerationLava * lavaSides + heatGenerationNether. Note: lavaSides is how many sides are adjacent to lava, this includes the block itself if it is lava logged allowing for a max of 7 "sides".
The capacity in mB of the fluid tank in the Heat Generator.
Peak energy generation in Joules/t for the Advanced Solar Generator. Note: It can go higher than this value in some extreme environments.
Peak energy generation in Joules/t for the Solar Generator. Note: It can go higher than this value in some extreme environments.

The maximum Y value that affects the Wind Generators Power generation. This value gets clamped at the world's logical height. For example for worlds like the nether that are 256 blocks tall, but have a ceiling at 128 blocks, this would be clamped at 128.
Maximum energy generation in Joules/t that the Wind Generator can produce.
The minimum Y value that affects the Wind Generators Power generation. This value gets clamped at the world's minimum height.
Minimum energy generation in Joules/t that the Wind Generator can produce.
Rate in mB/t at which Hohlraum can accept D-T Fuel.
The number of Turbine Blades supported by each Electromagnetic Coil.
Amount of chemical (mB) that each block of the turbine's steam cavity contributes to the volume. Max = volume * chemicalPerTank
Amount of energy in Joules that each block of the turbine contributes to the total energy capacity. Max = volume * energyCapacityPerVolume
The rate in mB/t at which steam is condensed into water in the turbine.
The rate in mB/t at which steam is dispersed into the turbine.
The rate in mB/t at which steam is vented into the turbine.
mekanismgenerators.configuration.mekanismgenerators.storage: Base energy storage in Joules of: Advanced Solar Generator
Base energy storage in Joules of: Bio-Generator
Base energy storage in Joules of: Heat Generator
Base energy storage in Joules of: Solar Generator
Base energy storage in Joules of: Wind Generator
mekanismgenerators.death.attack.mekanismgenerators.fusion.p: %1$s was fused into oblivion whilst trying to escape %2$s.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.control_r: A collection of control rods used to halt a fission chain reaction. Placed on top of a tower of Fission Fuel Assemblies.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.fission_f: A cluster of fuel rods used to house fission fuel within a Fission Reactor. These can be stacked on top of each other.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.fission_r: Lead-infused steel casing used to create a Fission Reactor. Mostly heat-resistant, mostly radiation-resistant, and mostly safe!
A block that can be used to monitor or control the Fission Reactor with redstone.
A port which can be placed on a Fission Reactor multiblock to transfer coolant, fuel, and waste.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.fusion_re: The controlling block for the entire Fusion Reactor structure.
Reinforced framing that can be used in the Fusion Reactor multiblock.
A block that can be used to allow basic monitoring of a reactor using redstone.
A block of reinforced framing that is capable of managing both the gas and energy transfer of the Fusion Reactor.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.geotherma: Harnesses geothermal energy from the surrounding environment, and improves protection against damage from heat sources. Install multiple for faster charging and greater protection.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.reactor.l: Activate the reactor when powered, and deactivate when unpowered
Output when the reactor has reached a critical level of waste (%1$s)
Output when the reactor reaches critical damage levels (100%+).
Output when the reactor reaches dangerous temperatures
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.rotationa: A connector that is placed on the highest Turbine Rotor of an Industrial Turbine to carry kinetic energy into its Electromagnetic Coils.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.saturatin: A block that condenses steam processed by an Industrial Turbine into reusable water. These can be placed in any arrangement above your rotational complex.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.solar_gen: A generator that uses the power of the sun to produce energy.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.solar_rec: Harnesses the power of the sun to charge your MekaSuit. Install multiple for faster charging.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.turbine_c: Pressure-resistant casing used in the creation of an Industrial Turbine.
mekanismgenerators.description.mekanismgenerators.turbine_v: A type of Turbine Casing with an integrated vent for the release of steam. These should be placed on the level of or above the turbine's Rotational Complex.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.force_disable: Reactor must reach safe damage and temperature levels before it can be reactivated.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.invalid_bad_c: Couldn't form, improper placement for Control Rod Assembly at %1$s.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.invalid_bad_f: Couldn't form, missing fuel assembly for control rod at %1$s.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.invalid_extra: Couldn't form, found extra Control Rod Assembly at %1$s.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.invalid_malfo: Couldn't form, invalid Fission Fuel Assembly placement at %1$s.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.invalid_missi: Couldn't form, no fuel assembly structures present.
mekanismgenerators.fission.mekanismgenerators.missing_contr: Couldn't form, missing control rod for fuel assembly at %1$s.

mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_bad_c: Couldn't form, found improperly placed Rotational Complex at %1$s. Complex must be centered above Turbine Rotors.
mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_bad_r: Couldn't form, found invalid Turbine Rotor at %1$s. Turbine Rotors must be centered below Rotational Complex.
Couldn't form, invalid Turbine Rotor arrangement.
mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_conde: Couldn't form, found improperly placed Saturating Condenser at %1$s. Saturating Condensers must be above Pressure Disperser layer.
mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_even_: Couldn't form, width and length of structure must be odd.
mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_malfo: Couldn't form, Electromagnetic Coil arrangement is malformed. Coils must be connected to Rotational Complex and adjacently connected.
Couldn't form, Pressure Disperser arrangement is malformed. Dispersers must create complete horizontal layer surrounding Rotational Complex.

mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_too_n: Couldn't form, structure is too narrow to support turbine size.
mekanismgenerators.turbine.mekanismgenerators.invalid_vent_: Couldn't form, found a Turbine Vent below Pressure Disperser layer. Vents must be at or above vertical position of disperser layer.

The chance that mobs can spawn with Bronze chestplates.

modernfix.modernfix.redirector_installed: ModernFix detected that Redirector is installed. Redirector is known to cause many strange and hard-to-debug issues, and removing it is strongly recommended.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.dynamic_soun: All versions. Allows the game to unload sounds, instead of sounds indefinitely persisting after being loaded.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.dynamic_reso: LDLib compatibility patch for dynamic resources
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.compress_uni: Stores the glyphs for the Unicode font more efficiently. Kudos to @AnAwesomGuy for the trick.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.world_leak: Reduces the memory usage of old client-side worlds that aren't needed after switching dimensions. These are normally garbage collected in vanilla, but mods sometimes retain references to them.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.compact_moja: (Fabric) Experimental option that reduces the memory usage of registries by roughly 50%. Not useful in most modpacks unless they contain millions of blocks and items.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.dynamic_bloc: Avoids storing a codec for every block(state) and instead generates and caches it on the fly when needed. Generally not worth enabling unless you have a million blocks/items.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.faster_comma: Mitigate lag when there are hundreds of thousands of suggestions while typing a command
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.mojang_regis: Fixes an issue causing registration of blocks/items to slow down proportional to the number already registered. This improves startup time.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.cache_profil: Avoids pointlessly creating a URL object and speeds up skull block rendering.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.entity_pos: Fixes Forge issue #9118, where mods can cause undebuggable render crashes by pushing the matrix stack without popping it.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.file_dialo: Fixes a security issue with the worldgen settings file dialog
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.forge_vehi: Fixes a bug introduced by a Forge patch that causes excessive amounts of chunk data packets to be sent to the player if they are riding a vehicle on a chunk border.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.mantle_mod: Fixes a bug in Mantle that can cause random ConcurrentModificationException crashes when rendering Tinkers Construct content.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.model_data: Works around design flaws in the Forge ModelDataManager system that can cause unexpected concurrency issues.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.recipe_boo: Fixes Forge clients being disconnected when connecting to a vanilla server if mods add custom recipe book entry types.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.unsafe_mod: Fixes various ConcurrentModificationExceptions that can occur in content mods when computing block shapes
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.stalled_c: This option may help to detect the cause of chunkloading freezes. However, leaving it enabled may cause slightly worse performance.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.fix_loop_spi: Fixes Minecraft's built-in wait function consuming excessive amounts of CPU resources.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.forge_cap_re: Small micro-optimization that makes retrieving custom entity data slightly more efficient on Forge.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.forge_regist: Fixes oversights in Forge that lead to excessive allocation in hot registry methods.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.restore_ol: Fixes MC-272431, which tracks the ender dragon being unable to dive to the portal as it did in 1.13 and older. This causes the dragon to fly quite a bit differently from what modern players are used to and also patches out one-cycling, so it's not enabled by default. Thanks to Jukitsu for identifying the regression in the vanilla code.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.missing_bl: Hypixel sends chunks to the client that are missing some block entity data, which makes chests etc. appear invisible. This 'fixes' the problem by creating the needed data on the client. Has no effect for properly behaved servers or in singleplayer.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.buffer_bui: Attempts to work around mods constructing BufferBuilder objects that leak memory. This can cause the JVM to crash with an hs_err_pid file in some rare cases. If you experience this type of crash, try disabling this option.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.extra_expe: Fixes the experimental feature warning being shown still being shown the first time you reopen a world that was created as experimental.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.forge_at_i: Fixes a major oversight in Forge's early error handling code that causes some parts of mods to load, but not others, which usually results in the game crashing rather than displaying the intended error screen. This issue was fixed in NeoForge, and eventually fixed in new enough versions of Forge.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.world_scre: Fixes MC-251068, where deleting the last world takes you back to an empty world list.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.blockenti: **This is a debug option and should not be enabled for regular gameplay.** Attempts to detect mods interacting with block entities on the wrong thread and crash the game with more information, rather than an unclear ConcurrentModificationException
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.cause_lag: Disables the game's use of worker threads for the server and for chunk rendering. **This will make performance worse on almost all hardware**, and should only be enabled on a client, when you know exactly what you are doing, and probably only on hardware with very few (2 or less) physical CPU cores. In those rare cases, it can reduce lag spikes since there is less contention over the limited cores.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.registry_: Runs the Forge loading screen on a background thread for part of the loading process, to allow progress to be shown while content is being registered. May have compatibility issues with some GPU drivers (e.g. macOS), so do not enable it by default in a modpack.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.remove_ch: Prevents the Minecraft client from obtaining the keypair for chat signing. This disables the client's ability to sign chat messages (like No Chat Reports, but in a simpler, albeit less user-friendly way).
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.remove_te: Prevents the Minecraft client from sending telemetry to Mojang. The telemetry is generally not relevant to them anyway for a modded instance.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.chunk_meshin: Implements some minor optimizations to the vanilla chunk meshing logic (they will have no effect with a mod that replaces chunk rendering entirely).
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.faster_struc: Improves the speed at which structures like buried treasure can be located.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.forge_regist: Fixes more oversights in Forge that lead to excessive allocation in hot registry methods.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.memoize_crea: Improves on vanilla's existing caching for creative tab contents in a way that is compatible with the timing requirements of mods like JEI/EMI. This can reduce the lag spike when opening the creative inventory for the first time in a modpack.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.potential_sp: Optimizes the Forge event for finding potential mobs that can spawn. This reduces allocations and the overhead of rebuilding a weighted list when no mods modify the potential spawns.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.ticking_chun: Optimizes chunk ticking in vanilla to reduce allocations.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.perf.worldgen_all: Optimizes some world generation logic in vanilla to reduce object allocations.
modernfix.modernfix.option.mixin.feature.suppress_: Prevents the game from logging a very long stacktrace when the narrator fails to load on Linux (usually caused by not having libflite installed).

modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.activator.a:
§a§nAction§r

The activator module can simulate: 
- Right-clicking a block with the item in the router's buffer (e.g. using a hoe, flipping a lever); 
- Right-clicking a nearby entity (e.g. milking a cow with a bucket in the router's buffer).
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.activator.s:
§a§nSneak§r

Toggle whether the router should simulate sneaking while doing its right-click operation.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.augments:
§a§nAugments§r

These four slots can take Module Augments, craftable items which can be inserted into a module to modify or enhance its functionality in some way.

See the item tooltips on augment items for more information on what each augment does.

Note that augments can only be inserted/removed when you are holding a single module item, to avoid augments being duplicated.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.breaker.mat:
§a§nMatch Type§r

- Match by Dropped Item(s): when breaking a block, the filter matches on the item(s) that would be dropped (note that Silk Touch will affect drops)
- Match by Block: the filter matches on the block itself, e.g. Stone in the filter would match Stone blocks, even without Silk Touch (although the drop is still Cobblestone)
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.detector.si:
§a§nRedstone Signal Level§r

Here can you define the redstone signal level, an integer quantity between 0 and 15 inclusive.  A signal of this strength will be emitted in the module's direction when the filter matches the buffer item.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.direction:
§a§nDirection Control§r

This area of the GUI allows you to define the direction the module operates in. This direction is relative to the front of the router. The default direction is NONE, which for most modules means the module will not run; you will need to define a direction.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.distributor:
§a§nTransfer Direction§r

Here you can control whether the router sends items out, or pulls items in to itself.

§a§nDistribution Strategy§r

This defines the order in which inventories will be attempted. Four possible strategies exist:

§eRound Robin§r - Each targeted inventory will be attempted in turn.

§eRandom§r - A random inventory is attempted on each tick.

§eNearest First§r - The closest inventory with space to insert will be used.

§eFurthest First§r - The most distant inventory with space to insert will be used.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.extruder2.t:
§a§nTemplate§r

Here you can define a template of blocks to extrude; note that real blocks are not placed, but rather special uncraftable & unlootable template blocks.

Put ghost copies of blocks in the template to define what is extruded; blocks will be extruded from left to right and top to bottom in order. You can extrude more than one of each block if you want (left- or right-click blocks in the template to adjust).

Note you can also place non-block items (e.g. a stick) in the template; while they obviously can't be placed, they are used as spacers to "place" one or more air blocks in the pattern.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.filter:
§a§nFilter§r

Place ghost copies of items here to filter what this module works on.  If the item in the router's buffer doesn't match the filter item(s) here, then the module will not run.  See also the filter control buttons below.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.filterContr:
§a§nFilter Control§r

These buttons control how the filter is applied to the item in the router's buffer. See individual tooltips on each button for more information.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.flinger.pit:
§a§nFlinger Pitch§r

This is the vertical offset in degrees:

- When the module faces horizontally, it's the offset up or down from that horizontal (X or Z) axis 
- When the module faces up or down, it's the offset from the vertical (Y) axis.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.flinger.spe:
§a§nFlinger Speed§r

This is the speed which is imparted to the item when thrown from the router.

As a rough guide, a speed of 1.0 and a pitch of 30 (and a horizontal module facing) will fling an item about 20 blocks in that direction.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.flinger.yaw:
§a§nFlinger Yaw§r

This is the horizontal offset in degrees:

- When the module faces horizontally, it's the offset left or right from that horizontal (X or Z) axis 
- When the module faces up or down, it's the offset from the vertical (Y) axis.  This is only useful if you also have a non-zero pitch.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.fluid.direc:
§a§nTransfer Direction§r

Here you can control whether the router pushes fluid out to the world or tank, or pulls fluid from the world or tank.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.fluid.force:
§a§nXP Force Empty§r

When you empty a bucket of any fluid into a pool of that fluid in Minecraft, the fluid in the bucket is lost & gone forever. This is not necessarily desirable.

The Fluid Module, by default, will not attempt to pour out any fluid into the world, unless the target block is completely empty, i.e. air.  You can override this behaviour by toggling the "Force" button; when enabled, the Fluid Module will not hesitate to pour fluid into an existing pool - just be aware that you may lose fluids by doing this...
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.fluid.maxTr:
§a§nMax Transfer§r

This is the maximum amount of fluid that the router will attempt to transfer in one operation.

Note that the transfer rate is still limited by the number of Fluid Transfer Upgrades in the router, as well as the transfer rate of the external tank (if there is one). So this number should be considered a limit rather than a target.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.noDirection:
§a§nDirection Control§r

This area of the GUI allows you to define the direction the module operates in. This direction is relative to the router's facing.

This module does not have the concept of a direction, so this area is empty.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.player.cont:
§a§nPlayer Module§r

Here you can define: 
- Whether the router transfers items from the player to the router, or from the router to the player; 
- Which section of the player inventory should be interacted with.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.xpVacuum:
§a§nXP Collection Type§r

Here you can define how XP orbs are collected. The options available depend on what other mods are installed and what experience fluids are available; however vanilla Bottles o' Enchanting are always available.

If collecting experience in fluid form, you must either insert a tank into the router's buffer capable of storing fluid by the mB (i.e. not a vanilla bucket), or place a tank adjacent to the router and check the Eject button below.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.popup.xpVacuum.ej:
§a§nXP Fluid Ejection§r

If checked, the router will attempt to eject any XP fluid into a suitable adjacent tank (sides checked in order: D, U, N, S, W, E). Note that only XP fluids are considered for ejection, not solid XP items.

This may be useful if you don't have a mod that provides a tank which can be filled as an item in the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.whitelist:
Whitelist
The module will run only if the filter matches.
An empty whitelist will never allow the module to run.

Blacklist
The module will not run if the filter matches.
An empty blacklist will always allow the module to run.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.eco.false:
Eco Mode §edisabled 
§7Router will always run at normal speed.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.eco.true:
Eco Mode §aenabled 
§7If router is idle for >%f seconds, it will enter low-power mode and only run every %f seconds.  It will leave low-power mode upon processing any item and return to running at normal speed.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.energy.fr: Transfer energy from router's buffer to item
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.energy.to: Transfer energy from item to router's buffer
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.extruder2:
§bTemplate
Place copies of block items here to be used as the extruder template. You can also use non-block items to represent an Air block
• §eLeft-Click:§7 reduce stack size
• §eRight-Click:§7 increase stack size
• §eShift + Left-Click:§7 clear stack
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.fluidForc:
§bForce Emptying Disabled 
When pouring into the world: if the target block is not completely empty, no fluid will be poured out.

§bForce Emptying Enabled 
When pouring into the world: fluid will always be poured out of the router if possible. Warning: this can cause fluid to be lost, e.g. emptying lava into an existing lava block. Use with care.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.fluidRegu:
§bFluid Regulation Enabled
When transferring from router: only insert when destination tank(s) are less than this full.
When transferring to router: only extract if source tank(s) are more than this full.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.fluidTran:
§bMax Fluid Transfer
Maximum (in mB) that will be attempted in one operation.
This is still limited by the router's overall transfer rate (Fluid and Speed Upgrades)
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.match_dam:
Ignore Item Damage
Treat damageable items of the same type but different damage levels as the same

Match Item Damage
Distinguish between damageable items of the same type with different damage levels
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.match_com:
Ignore Item Components
Ignore item component data on an item when matching

Match Item Components
Take item component data, e.g. enchantments, into account when matching
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.match_ite:
Tag Matching Enabled
Items which share a common item tag with any item in the filter will match
Use a Tag Filter for more precise item tag matching
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.loadFilte:
Load Filter
 from %s @ %s
§oExisting filter contents will be overwritten!
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.match_all:
Match Any
Any item in the filter may match for the filter to match.
Use this under most circumstances.

Match All
ALL items in the filter must match for the filter to match.
Used in specific circumstances, e.g. if you want to test for enchanted leather armor.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.maxFluidP: Transfer Rate: %d mB every %d ticks (%d mB / tick)
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.numberFie:
• §e§oCursor Up/Down§7 or mouse wheel: adjust
• Hold §e§oShift§7: coarse adjust
• Hold §e§oCtrl§7: fine adjust
• §e§oPage Up/Down§7: set to max/min
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.regulator:
§bItem Regulation Enabled
When inserting: only insert when inventory has fewer than this many of the item.
When extracting: only extract if inventory has more than this many of the item.
modularrouters.modularrouters.guiText.tooltip.terminate: Always continue executing subsequent modules on this tick, regardless of whether this module did anything.
Don't execute any subsequent modules on this tick if this module did NOT do anything.
Don't execute any subsequent modules on this tick if this module did something.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.fluid.maxTransfe: Fluid Rate: Up to %s mB / operation
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.misc.energyWarni:
At least one installed module requires FE energy to run.
Router needs more FE energy!

At least one installed module requires FE energy to run.
Add one or more Energy Upgrades!
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.misc.holdShiftKe: ▶ Hold [%s] for settings, [%s] for more info
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.targetingHintMul:
• Sneak + Right-Click an unselected inventory to select it
• Sneak + Right-Click a selected inventory to unselect
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.targetingHint:
• Sneak + Right-Click an inventory to set target
• Sneak + Right-Click any non-inventory block to clear target
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.activ:
Simulates right-clicking blocks and entities using the item(s) in the router's buffer.
Acts as if the router is a fake player.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.blast: Makes the router immune to explosion damage and boss destruction.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.break: Breaks a block adjacent to the router in the module's configured direction, pulling it as an item into the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.bulk_:
High-capacity, high-performance filter for large numbers of items. Place in a router module's filter like any other item.
• Sneak + Right-click any inventory: merge contents into filter.
• Right-click: view/configure.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.camou:
Makes the router look like another block.
• Sneak + Right-click a solid block to copy its appearance onto the upgrade.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.creat: Creates items out of thin air and inserts them into the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.detec: Emits a redstone signal from the router in the module's configured direction IF the item in the router's buffer passes the module's filter.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.distr: Distributes items from the router's buffer to multiple inventories, with a choice of round-robin, random, nearest-first or furthest-first.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.dropp: Drops items from the router's buffer in the module's configured direction.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.energ: Wirelessly distributes FE energy from the router's energy buffer or any energy-containing item in the item buffer to nearby energy-containing blocks
Pushes FE energy from the router's energy buffer or any energy-containing item in the item buffer
Increases a router's energy buffer capacity by %d FE and transfer rate by %d FE/router tick

• This router's energy capacity: %d FE
• This router's transfer rate: %d FE/router tick
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.extru:
Places or removes blocks in a line along the module's direction, depending on the router's redstone signal level.
Default is to place with a signal and remove with no signal; add Redstone Augment to the module for custom behaviour.
Operates like the Extruder Mk1, but places template blocks from an internal pattern buffer instead of real blocks from the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.fast_: Allow the Vacuum Module to ignore the normal pickup delays on dropped items.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.filte:
Instead of the default any/all behaviour, the module will match against a single item from its filter on each execution tick. The item to be matched is picked in ascending round robin order.
Useful to work on a series of items in a specific order.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.fling: Throws items from the router's buffer over potentially long distances.  Adjust speed, pitch & yaw from the module's GUI.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.fluid:
Transfers fluids into or out of the router to/from any nearby block.
• Router's buffer must have a fluid container item in it.
• Can transfer to/from tanks or the world.

Transfers fluids into or out of the router to/from an adjacent block in the module's direction.
• Router's buffer must have a fluid container item in it.
• Can transfer to/from tanks or the world.
Increases the amount of fluid a router can transfer (in each direction) by %d mB/tick.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.inspe:
Filter items by inspecting various properties of the item. Place in a router module's filter like any other item.
• Right-click: view/configure.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.mimic: Allows the fake blocks placed by the Extruder Mk2 to also mimic lighting, redstone emission, hardness and blast resistance of the blocks whose appearance is being mimicked.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.mod_f:
Filter items by the mods they come from. Place in a router module's filter like any other item.
• Right-click: view/configure.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.muffl:
Suppresses sound & particle effects from routers/modules:
• 1 upgrade will suppress sound effects
• 2 or more will also suppress particle effects
• 3 or more will also suppress the router-active animation.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.picku: Increases the pickup delay time for dropped or flung items by 10 ticks per augment.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.place: Places an item from the router's buffer as a block in the module's configured direction, if possible.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.playe: Remotely transfers items between a player's main or armor inventory and the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.pulle: Extracts items from an adjacent inventory in the module's configured direction into the router's buffer.
Extracts items from any nearby inventory into the router's buffer.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.pushi: Increases the force by which Extruder Mk1/2 can push entities away when extruding blocks.  Can be stacked.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.range: Reduces range of modules by 1 block per augment.
Increases range of modules by 1 block per augment (up to hard maximum - see module tooltip)
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.redst: Allows a module to define its own specific redstone behaviour, overriding the router's redstone behaviour.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.regex:
Filter items by matching their registry names (viewable with F3+H) against one or more regular expressions. Place in a router module's filter like any other item.
• Right-click: view/configure.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.regul: Allow precise control over how many items are kept in an inventory.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.secur:
Protects router; only listed players can access the router.
Also protects owner from attack by Activator Module, and makes several modules work as the owning player; very useful when chunks are claim-protected.
• Right-click a player to add them to this upgrade
• Sneak + Right-click player to remove them
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.sende:
Sends items from the router's buffer to any inventory directly along an X/Y/Z axis.
Clear line of sight required; opaque blocks will prevent sending.

Sends items from the router's buffer to any nearby inventory.
Clear line of sight NOT required.
Sends items from the router's buffer to any inventory in any dimension.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.speed:
Increases the router tick rate.
• This router ticks every %.02f sec (%d ticks)
• Max. useful upgrades: %d
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.stack:
Allows the module to process multiple items per tick.
This overrides Stack Upgrades inserted in the router.

Increases the number of items processed per router tick.
• Max. items processed per operation: %d
• Max. useful upgrades: %d
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.sync_:
Makes routers activate together.
• Right-click: open tuning GUI
• Sneak + Right-click: tune to a random value.
• All routers with the same-tuned Sync Upgrade (and same number of Speed Upgrades) will run at the same time.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.tag_f: Filter items by the item tags to which they belong.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.vacuu:
Absorbs nearby items in the world into the router's buffer.
Operates in all directions by default, but can be configured to operate in one direction only.
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.void_:
§c§oCAUTION§r
Permanently destroys items in the buffer!
modularrouters.modularrouters.itemText.usage.item.xp_va:
Allows the Vacuum Module to collect XP orbs instead of items.
XP can be converted into a variety of solid & liquid forms, depending on what other mods are installed, but vanilla Bottles o' Enchanting are always available. Liquid XP conversion requires a tank capable of storing liquids by the mB either in the router's buffer as an item, or placed adjacent to the router as a block (with Eject mode enabled in the module GUI).
modularrouters.modularrouters.jei.recipe.module_reset.d: Completely resets the module to its newly-crafted state.  Beware: ALL data, including filter settings and enchantments, will be lost (but any installed augments will be returned)
modularrouters.modularrouters.patchouli.book.landing: This manual is a complete reference guide to $(#228)Modular Routers/$.
modularrouters.modularrouters.patchouli.book.name: Modular Routers Manual
