rarcompat.tooltip.rarcompat.mimi_dust: When used on a chest, it transforms it into a mimic that drops as many random relics as it originally contained before the transformation.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.umbrella.description: Softens the fall, providing safe landing from any height. When skillfully used, it can serve as a reliable shield, keeping enemies at bay.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.umbrella.ability.glider.d: When held in hand, reduces the player's vertical speed, negating fall damage. Pressing LMB propels the player backward and triggers a cooldown of %2$s seconds. The push can be used up to %1$s times in succession before the player touches the ground.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.umbrella.ability.shield.d: When used, functions as a shield, pushing targets up to %1$s blocks away.
+%1$s experience points for each second of falling.
+%1$s experience points for each mid-air dash performed using the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.plastic_drinking_hat.desc: Speeds up the drinking process, not only quickly quenching thirst but also replenishing hunger in an extraordinary way.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.plastic_drinking_hat.abil: Increases drinking speed by %1$s%%. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
Replenishes %1$s hunger points when consuming liquids. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.plastic_drinking_hat.leve: +%1$s experience points for each consumed drink.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.novelty_drinking_hat.desc: Speeds up the drinking process, not only quickly quenching thirst but also replenishing hunger in an extraordinary way.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.novelty_drinking_hat.abil: Increases drinking speed by %1$s%%. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
Replenishes %1$s hunger points when consuming liquids. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.novelty_drinking_hat.leve: +%1$s experience points for each consumed drink.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snorkel.description: Allows for longer underwater exploration without the risk of drowning.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snorkel.ability.diving.de: Applies a water breathing effect for %1$s seconds upon full submersion.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snorkel.ability.passive.d: Removes the fog effect in liquids.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snorkel.leveling_source.d: +%1$s experience points for each second of the water breathing effect from the %2$s ability. If the player already has a water breathing effect, its duration is subtracted from the gained experience proportionally.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.villager_hat.description: Reduces trading prices with villagers, making deals more profitable.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.villager_hat.ability.disc: Increases the discount when trading with villagers by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.villager_hat.ability.pass: Prevents Iron Golems from attacking the player.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.villager_hat.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points for each trade with villagers. The amount of experience gained increases by the discount value provided by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.superstitious_hat.descrip: Increases loot drops from defeated mobs.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.superstitious_hat.ability: Has a %1$s%% chance to apply an additional level of Looting to defeated mobs. If successful, the ability repeats, adding another Looting level. This continues until the chance fails, summing all levels.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.superstitious_hat.levelin: +%1$s experience points for each additional level of Looting activated by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.anglers_hat.ability.catch: Has a %1$s%% chance to increase the amount of catch received. If successful, the ability repeats, adding more catch. This continues until the chance fails, summing all catches.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.anglers_hat.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each additional catch generated by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.lucky_scarf.description: Increases Luck level when mining blocks.
Has a %1$s%% chance to apply an additional level of Luck to mined blocks. If successful, the ability repeats, adding another Luck level. This continues until the chance fails, summing all levels.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.lucky_scarf.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each additional level of Luck activated by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.scarf_of_invisibility.des: When moving carefully, makes the player invisible to surroundings.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.scarf_of_invisibility.abi: Grants the player complete invisibility. The effect is lost for %1$s seconds upon any interaction with the world. If during the absence of invisibility any mob targets the player, the effect will not restore until that mob won't lose sight of the player.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.scarf_of_invisibility.lev: +%1$s experience points for each use of the %2$s ability to become invisible.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.flame_pendant.description: Burns anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.flame_pendant.ability.fir: Has a %2$s%% chance to ignite the target attacking the player for %1$s seconds.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.flame_pendant.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.description: Strikes with lightning anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.ability.pas: Grants complete resistance to lightning damage.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.ability.lig: Has a %2$s%% chance to strike the target attacking the player with lightning, dealing %1$s damage.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.thorn_pendant.description: Poisons anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.thorn_pendant.ability.poi: Has a %3$s%% chance to reflect %1$s%% damage and apply poison to the target attacking the player for %2$s seconds.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.thorn_pendant.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.description: Enhances the agility of the relic bearer’s mounts.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.ability.cowboy: Increases the movement speed, jump height, and safe fall height of mounts by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.ability.overlo: When used, this ability allows you to ride and control any mob for up to %1$s seconds. After the time expires or dismounting, it goes on a 1-minute cooldown.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.leveling_sourc: +%1$s experience points with a 25% chance for each second of riding.
+%1$s experience points for each use of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.crystal_heart.description: Grants the relic bearer extra strength by increasing their maximum health.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.crystal_heart.ability.hea: Increases the player's maximum health by %1$s points.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.crystal_heart.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each instance of health regeneration. The probability of gaining experience is inversely proportional to the ratio of current health to maximum health.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.universal_attractor.descr: Manipulates a weak magnetic field around the relic bearer, controlling the gravity of nearby items.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.universal_attractor.abili: A toggleable ability with 3 modes: Attraction, Repulsion, and Neutrality. In the red Attraction mode, items within a radius of %1$s blocks are drawn toward the player. In the blue Repulsion mode, items are pushed away. The purple Neutrality mode disables the relic's effect.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.universal_attractor.level: +%1$s experience points for each item picked up using the %2$s ability. The probability of gaining experience is directly proportional to the ratio of current item count in the stack to its maximum capacity. Does not work if the item was dropped by the relic bearer.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cross_necklace.descriptio: Envelops the relic bearer in a protective aura, granting temporary invulnerability after each hit taken.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cross_necklace.ability.in: Increases the duration of invulnerability after taking damage by %1$s seconds.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cross_necklace.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each instance of damage taken.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.night_vision_goggles.desc: Allows the relic bearer to see more clearly in the dark.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.night_vision_goggles.abil: Enhances the brightness of poorly lit areas and reduces the effectiveness of blindness and darkness by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.night_vision_goggles.leve: +%1$s experience points for every 5 seconds of movement in darkness. The probability of gaining experience is directly proportional to the current light level ratio at the player's location to the maximum.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cloud_in_a_bottle.descrip: Enhances the relic bearer's agility, allowing for additional jumps in the air.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cloud_in_a_bottle.ability: Allows up to %1$s additional air jumps.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.cloud_in_a_bottle.levelin: +%1$s experience points for each additional jump performed using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.vampiric_glove.descriptio: Grants the relic bearer's attacks a vampiric effect, healing them by a portion of the damage dealt.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.vampiric_glove.ability.va: Heals the player for %1$s%% of the damage dealt.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.vampiric_glove.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability. The probability of gaining experience is directly proportional to the ratio of healing received to the player's maximum health.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.golden_hook.description: Allows the relic bearer to perform more precise attacks, retaining more experience from killed mobs.
Increases experience gained from killing mobs by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.golden_hook.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.onion_ring.description: Enhances the relic bearer's block mining efficiency when sufficiently satiated.
Increases block mining speed by %1$s%% per unit of the player's saturation.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.onion_ring.ability.satura: When mining blocks, there is a %1$s%% chance to restore 1 hunger point and 0.5 saturation to the player.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.onion_ring.leveling_sourc: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each block mined. The chance of gaining experience is directly proportional to current saturation. Does not work on blocks with instant break.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.digging_claws.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's hands, allowing them to chop through any blocks more effectively.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.digging_claws.ability.pas: Reduces the required tool level for all blocks by 1.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.digging_claws.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each mined block. The probability of gaining experience is directly proportional to the block's toughness. Does not work on blocks with instant destruction.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.feral_claws.description: Awakens a bloodthirsty instinct in the relic bearer, making them fight faster with each consecutive attack.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.feral_claws.ability.claws: Increases the player's attack speed by %1$s%% for each consecutive attack performed within 3 seconds of the last. Otherwise, loses 1 charge per second. Attacking with an unfilled attack speed bar resets the accumulated charges.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.feral_claws.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.descripti: Enhances the relic bearer's resistance to effects.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.ability.a: Reduces the duration of negative effects received by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.ability.d: Each successful attack steals %1$s seconds from all positive effects present on the target.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.leveling_: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each effect stolen using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.power_glove.description: Allows the relic bearer to perform empowered attacks.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.power_glove.ability.power: Increases the player's damage dealt by %1$s%% but enters a 5-second cooldown after each attack.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.power_glove.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.withered_bracelet.descrip: Fills the relic bearer's weapon with withering energy, affecting all it touches.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.withered_bracelet.ability: Has a %1$s%% chance to apply the Wither effect to the attacked target for %2$s seconds.
Grants complete resistance to wither damage.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.withered_bracelet.levelin: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snowshoes.description: Improves the relic bearer's mobility in harsh snowy conditions.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snowshoes.ability.passive: Allows walking on powder snow without sinking.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snowshoes.ability.speed.d: Increases movement speed on snow by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.snowshoes.leveling_source: +%1$s experience points for every 3 seconds of movement on snow.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.steadfast_spikes.descript: Firmly anchors the relic bearer's feet to any surface.
Increases resistance to knockback and slippery blocks by %1$s%%.
Allows slow wall sliding, negating fall damage.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.steadfast_spikes.leveling: +%1$s experience points for each knockback reduced by the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for every 3 seconds of sliding on blocks.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.rooted_boots.description: Grants the relic bearer the mysterious power of a sheep.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.rooted_boots.ability.devo: Every %1$s seconds transforms the grass block beneath the player into dirt, restoring 1 hunger and saturation point.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.rooted_boots.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.warp_drive.description: Allows the relic bearer to teleport their body over short distances.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.warp_drive.ability.telepo: Teleports the player to a position along their line of sight within %1$s blocks, then goes on a cooldown for %2$s seconds.
Line of sight to teleport position
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.warp_drive.leveling_sourc: +%1$s experience points for every 10 blocks traversed using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.charm_of_shrinking.descri: Allows the relic bearer to shrink their body to access previously unreachable areas.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.whoopee_cushion.descripti: Mysteriously increases the relic bearer's flatulence, leading to entirely unpredictable outcomes.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.whoopee_cushion.ability.p: Has a %1$s%% chance to knock back entities within a %2$s block radius, applying a 10-second nausea effect when taking damage or crouching frequently.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.whoopee_cushion.leveling_: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.descriptio: Grants the relic bearer feline traits, including soft paws and countless lives.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.ability.pa: Scares away all Creepers and Phantoms near the player.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.ability.fa: Increases safe falling height by %1$s blocks.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each fall made safe by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.ability.re: Has a %1$s%% chance to save the player from fatal damage, leaving them with 1 health point.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each point of damage from the last fatal attack prevented by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.bunny_hoppers.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to push off the ground more powerfully.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.bunny_hoppers.ability.hol: Allows high jumps by continuously holding the jump key for up to %1$s seconds.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.bunny_hoppers.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each high jump performed using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.charm_of_sinking.descript: Grants the relic bearer's legs the ability to absorb air from the ground.
While the player stands on the underwater floor, it blocks air consumption and slowly restores its supply by %1$s seconds every second.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.charm_of_sinking.leveling: +%1$s experience points for each touch of the underwater floor.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.panic_necklace.descriptio: Quickens the relic bearer's heartbeat, warning of impending danger.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.panic_necklace.ability.pa: Increases the player's movement speed by %1$s%% for each mob within a %2$s blocks radius targeting the player for attack.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.panic_necklace.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each instance of damage taken from mobs affected by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.helium_flamingo.descripti: Temporarily allows the relic bearer to glide through air as they would water.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.helium_flamingo.ability.f: When performing a double jump, allows the player to float in the air for up to %1$s seconds. Movement speed in the air is proportional to the player's swimming speed with an additional bonus of %2$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.helium_flamingo.leveling_: +%1$s experience points for each second of air swimming using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.description: Grants the relic bearer's hands the strength of mechanisms.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.ability.dis: Increases knockback in melee attacks by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.ability.int: Increases maximum interaction range with the world by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each melee attack performed.
+%1$s experience points for each interaction with the world at the %2$s ability's extended range.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.obsidian_skull.descriptio: Redirects heat aimed at harming the relic bearer onto itself.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.obsidian_skull.ability.he: Completely absorbs damage from fire sources for up to %1$s seconds. If the player has not taken fire damage for 3 seconds, the absorption time regenerates each second.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.obsidian_skull.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each second of fire damage absorption using the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.fire_gauntlet.description: Grants the relic bearer’s weapon the powers of the fire element.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.fire_gauntlet.ability.cas: When attacking, releases several sparks that home in on nearby targets, igniting them for %3$s seconds and dealing %2$s%% of the performed attack's damage. The number of sparks is determined through repeated checks of a %1$s%% chance. Each successful check releases one additional spark, but the process stops as soon as the chance fails even once.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.fire_gauntlet.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each target hit by a spark from the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pickaxe_heater.descriptio: Concentrates surrounding heat precisely onto the relic bearer's tools.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pickaxe_heater.ability.he: Smelts any mined block if possible, consuming one charge from a buffer with a capacity of %1$s units. The buffer regenerates 1 charge every %2$s seconds.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.pickaxe_heater.leveling_s: +%1$s experience points for each block smelted by the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.chorus_totem.description: Allows the relic bearer to rewind time when making rash decisions.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.chorus_totem.ability.past: Each attack against the relic bearer has a %1$s%% chance per percent of missing health to teleport the attacker to a random location within a %2$s block radius.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.chorus_totem.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.running_shoes.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to move faster.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.running_shoes.ability.run: Increases the player's running speed by %1$s%%.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.running_shoes.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each second of running.
rarcompat.tooltip.relics.flippers.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to swim faster.
Increases the player's swimming speed by %1$s%%.
+%1$s experience points for each second of swimming.

relics.tooltip.relics.researching.badge.ability: The ability will not work under the effect of Oblivion.
The ability will not work under the effect of Silence.
The ability has reached perfect parameters. Be proud of yourself!
The ability activates immediately upon use.
The ability lasts for a certain time after use and can be interrupted by repeated use.
The ability works only with continuous use.
The ability can be toggled on/off when used.
The ability activates instantly after some time of cyclical use. The outcome may depend on the duration of use.
The ability has several modes that cycle with each use.
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.badge.relic.f: The relic has reached perfect parameters. Be proud of yourself!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.research.tip: To unlock the ability, it is necessary to connect the stars hidden beneath the fog in such a way that the resulting constellation matches the image in the background. When the constellation is correctly aligned, the ability will be automatically researched.
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.research.hint: Cost: %1$s player experience points (%2$s relative levels) %3$s.
Hold [Shift] for fully automatic ability research.
The ability has already been researched!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.badge.ability: Use the [%1$s] key outside any interface to call up the active abilities menu!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.general.level: Earned when leveling up the relic and used to upgrade abilities.
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.general.playe: Player experience from 'vanilla' Minecraft. Gained by killing mobs, mining ore, smelting items, etc.
Gained with each unsuccessful reroll of a relic's random attributes and increases the chance of getting better values on the next reroll. Increases the reroll cost by 5 player experience points for each percent of luck.
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.card.lo: To unlock, you need to level up the relic to %1$s!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.card.no: Ability has no upgradeable stats and does not affect the quality of the relic!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.card.un: To use, you need to conduct the research!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.card.re: Ability is ready to be unlocked! Clicks remaining: %1$s
Ability is ready to be upgraded!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.gem.low: To unlock the experience source, you need to level up the relic to %1$s!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.gem.loc: To unlock the experience source, you need to unlock and research the associated ability!
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.info.ex: Relic quality is the arithmetic average of all currently unlocked abilities' quality and is measured in points from 1 to 5 with a step of 0.5. It is purely a visual metric that shows how close the item's initial random characteristics are to the best possible. To improve the overall quality of the relic, each ability needs to be considered separately.
relics.tooltip.relics.researching.relic.experie: Gained by using relic abilities as intended (more details can be found on the experience sources page). Upon reaching the maximum experience value, the relic's level and the pool of upgrade points increase by 1, allowing you to unlock previously unavailable abilities or enhance existing ones.
Ability quality, similar to relic quality, is the arithmetic average of all the ability's current characteristics and is measured in points from 1 to 5 with a step of 0.5. It is purely a visual metric that shows how close the ability's initial random characteristics are to the best possible. To improve the ability's quality, you need to reset its random characteristics until you get a better value.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.upgrade.cost: Cost: %1$s upgrade points %2$s, %3$s player experience points (%4$s relative levels) %5$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.upgrade.locked: The ability has reached its max level.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.upgrade.quick: Hold [Shift] to automatically upgrade to the highest possible level.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.reroll.cost: Cost: %1$s player experience points (%2$s relative levels) %3$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.reroll.quick: Hold [Shift] to automatically reroll random stats to perfect values.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.reroll.warning: Hold [Shift] to confirm rerolling stats from perfect values to other random ones.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.reset.cost: Cost: %1$s player experience points (%2$s relative levels) %3$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.relic.reset.locked: To use you need to level-up this ability at least 1 time.
relics.tooltip.relics.infinity_ham.description: A mysterious piece of meat that smoothly regenerates to its original size, no matter how much you carve it.
relics.tooltip.relics.infinity_ham.ability.rege: Every %1$s seconds, regenerates up to 6 edible chunks, each restoring %2$s hunger points. When consumed, the relic automatically uses the required number of chunks to replenish the player's hunger.
relics.tooltip.relics.infinity_ham.ability.mari: Allows applying potion effects to the relic by left-clicking it with a potion in the inventory. Each time the relic is consumed, it applies these effects to the player for %1$s seconds per hunger point restored. Using a water bottle clears the last applied potion effects.
relics.tooltip.relics.infinity_ham.ability.meat: Allows the relic to be used as a melee weapon, dealing %1$s damage and stunning the target for %2$s seconds per chunk. Consumes all chunks when attacking, regardless of the target's remaining health.
relics.tooltip.relics.infinity_ham.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points for each chunk consumed through the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each effect applied to the relic using the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each chunk consumed during the activation of the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.enders_hand.description: +1 experience point for using the ability «End Transposition», +1 experience point for every 10 blocks from the distance to the target when using.
relics.tooltip.relics.enders_hand.ability.neutr: Makes endermen neutral to the wearer.
Swaps the user and the target along the line of sight within a range of up to %1$s blocks.
relics.tooltip.relics.holy_locket.description: Grants the wearer the ability to turn enemies' healing against them.
relics.tooltip.relics.holy_locket.ability.faith: Has 2 toggleable modes: Holiness and Unholiness. In the red Holiness mode, steals %1$s%% of the healing from visible entities within a radius of %3$s blocks and transfers it to the relic's wearer. In the blue Unholiness mode, deals damage to all visible entities within the same radius equal to %2$s%% of the healing received by the relic's wearer.
relics.tooltip.relics.holy_locket.ability.penit: Ignites undead enemies for 10 seconds and increases damage dealt to them by %1$s%%.
relics.tooltip.relics.holy_locket.ability.ascen: Killing a target grants the relic's wearer a temporary stacking immortality effect for %2$s seconds, up to a maximum of %1$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.holy_locket.leveling_sour: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
+%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability on an undead enemy that is not yet burning.
+%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.magic_mirror.description: +1 experience point for each use of the «Wormhole» ability, +1 experience point for every 50 blocks to the teleportation point.
relics.tooltip.relics.magic_mirror.ability.tele: Upon use, teleports the owner to their spawn point if it is within %1$s blocks, then goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.shadow_glaive.description: A masterfully forged, capricious weapon. If its temper is favorable, neither horde nor legion will withstand the onslaught of its thousand blades.
relics.tooltip.relics.shadow_glaive.ability.may: Dealing damage has a %1$s%% chance to trigger a projectile that bounces chaotically between nearby targets within a 16-block radius, up to %2$s times, dealing %3$s%% of the triggering attack's damage.
relics.tooltip.relics.shadow_glaive.ability.clo: Each projectile bounce from the Mayhem ability has a %1$s%% chance to spawn an additional identical projectile.
relics.tooltip.relics.shadow_glaive.leveling_so: +%1$s experience points for each activation of the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.blazing_flask.description: +1 experience point for every 5 seconds of flight within the scope of the ability «Eternal Fire».
relics.tooltip.relics.blazing_flask.ability.bon: Using the ability on a block creates a restricted flight zone with a maximum flight speed of %2$s blocks per second and a height of %3$s blocks. The area size depends on the amount of fire within a radius of %1$s blocks around the center, but if there is no fire at all, the zone will not be created.
relics.tooltip.relics.elytra_booster.descriptio: +1 experience point for every 10 seconds of burning fuel when placing it in the internal buffer of the relic from the ability «Acceleration».
relics.tooltip.relics.elytra_booster.ability.bo: Using any combustible fuel that would work in a furnace on the relic in the inventory replenishes its internal buffer, which has a maximum capacity of %1$s units. Activating the ability while flying with elytra gradually increases the player's flight speed up to %2$s blocks per second, consuming fuel from the internal buffer.
relics.tooltip.relics.midnight_robe.description: +1 experience point for every 2 units of damage when attacking while being invisible from the «Disappearing» ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.midnight_robe.ability.van: Grants the wearer complete invisibility and increases their movement speed by %2$s%% when the total light level does not exceed %1$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.midnight_robe.ability.bac: An attack while using the 'Vanish' ability deals %1$s%% increased damage, marking a circle with a radius of %2$s blocks around the target and dispelling the wearer's invisibility. The 'Vanish' ability can only be used again after the wearer exits the circle.
relics.tooltip.relics.reflection_necklace.descr: +1 experience point for every 10 damage accumulated in the internal buffer of the relic from the ability «Infernal Hatred».
relics.tooltip.relics.reflection_necklace.abili: Accumulates damage taken by the wearer into the relic's internal buffer, with a capacity of %1$s units. Five seconds after the last damage received or if the buffer overflows, the relic explodes, scattering obsidian shards in all directions. Each shard deals %2$s damage and stuns for %3$s seconds per unit of damage stored in the relic's internal buffer.
relics.tooltip.relics.jellyfish_necklace.descri: +1 experience point for each activation of the ability «Electric Discharge».
relics.tooltip.relics.jellyfish_necklace.abilit: The wearer does not sink in water.
Deals %1$s damage to targets upon collision with them.
When the «Electric Discharge» ability activates, it applies paralysis to the target for %1$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.spore_sack.description: A simple burlap sack filled to the brim with deadly miasma.
relics.tooltip.relics.spore_sack.ability.spore_: When the player's health drops below 50%, releases up to %1$s homing spores around them. These spores deal damage equal to %2$s%% of the player's missing health and block healing for affected targets for 5 seconds. The ability can trigger again once the player's health rises above 50%.
relics.tooltip.relics.spore_sack.leveling_sourc: +%1$s experience points for each successful hit by a spore from the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_breaker.description: +1 experience point for every 3 blocks in the fall before triggering the ability «Earthquake».
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_breaker.ability.susta: Increases fall speed, boosts knockback resistance by %1$s%%, and removes sliding on blocks.
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_breaker.ability.impac: Prolonged use of the ability while falling, up until landing, will create a shockwave with a radius of %1$s blocks, dealing up to %2$s damage and knocking back nearby targets. However, the power of the shockwave also depends on the distance the wearer has fallen.
relics.tooltip.relics.bastion_ring.description:
+1/5/10 experience point for each killed Zombified Piglin / Piglin / Piglin Brute.
+1 experience point for each additional trade from the ability «Respect».
relics.tooltip.relics.bastion_ring.ability.comp: Makes piglins neutral in relation to the wearer. The nearest piglin will indicate the location of a bastion nearby.
relics.tooltip.relics.bastion_ring.ability.trad: Each trade with piglins has a multiple 50% chance to yield an additional trade result, but the chance cannot trigger more than %1$s times.
relics.tooltip.relics.magma_walker.description: +1 experience point for every 5 units of heating from the ability «Fiery Tread».
relics.tooltip.relics.magma_walker.ability.pace: For %1$s seconds, allows walking on the surface of lava without sinking or taking damage. After the time runs out, the boots start overheating and deal damage to the wearer proportional to the level of overheating. To cool them down, the wearer must stay away from lava blocks. The cooling time also depends on the level of overheating.
relics.tooltip.relics.aqua_walker.description: +1 experience point for every 5 units of getting wet from the ability «Moisture Resistance».
relics.tooltip.relics.aqua_walker.ability.walki: For a certain period, allows walking on the surface of water without sinking. Once the time runs out, the boots start sinking, pulling the wearer underwater. To dry them, the wearer must stay away from water blocks. The drying time fully depends on the level of saturation.
relics.tooltip.relics.drowned_belt.description: +1 experience point for each level of enchantment «Riptide» on the trident when using it.
relics.tooltip.relics.drowned_belt.ability.slot: Increases the maximum number of amulet equipment slots by +%1$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.drowned_belt.ability.anch: Reduces swimming speed by %1$s%% and increases the wearer's sinking speed by %1$s%%.
relics.tooltip.relics.drowned_belt.ability.pres: Increases the damage dealt by the player underwater by %1$s%%.
relics.tooltip.relics.drowned_belt.ability.ript: Allows the trident's «Riptide» enchantment ability to be used without rain or water, adding a cooldown of %1$s seconds per enchantment level.
relics.tooltip.relics.hunter_belt.description: +1 experience point for each attack made by the wearer's pet.
relics.tooltip.relics.hunter_belt.ability.slots: Increases the maximum number of amulet equipment slots by +%1$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.hunter_belt.ability.train: Increases the damage dealt by the wearer's pets by %1$s%%.
relics.tooltip.relics.leather_belt.description: +1 experience point for each experience gained by equipped charms.
relics.tooltip.relics.leather_belt.ability.slot: Increases the maximum number of amulet equipment slots by +%1$s.
relics.tooltip.relics.rage_glove.description:
+1 experience point for every 3 charges from the ability «Berserker Rage» when they are reset.
+1 experience point for each target hit by the «Spurt» ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.rage_glove.ability.rage.d: Each attack made by the wearer within %3$s seconds of the last one accumulates 1 charge in the relic's internal buffer. The player's damage increases by %2$s%% per charge, but they also take %1$s%% more damage. If the player fails to attack within the given time to gain another charge, the relic's internal buffer is completely emptied, nullifying all accumulated bonuses.
relics.tooltip.relics.rage_glove.ability.phlebo: Increases the player's attack speed by %3$s%% and movement speed by %2$s%%, while also granting passive health regeneration of %1$s% per missing percent of the player's health.
When activated, performs a dash in the direction of the player's gaze up to %2$s blocks, igniting, inflicting bleeding, and attacking every target in its path with the item in hand. Deals additional damage to each target equal to %1$s per charge stored in the relic's internal buffer from the «Berserker's Rage» ability and then empties it, before going on cooldown for %3$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_skates.description: +1 experience point for each second of acceleration from the ability «Skating».
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_skates.ability.skatin: Increases movement speed on ice by %1$s%% per second of sliding. The modifier stops increasing if the sliding duration exceeds %2$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.ice_skates.ability.ram.de: Upon collision with targets, deals %1$s damage per second of sliding from the «Skating» ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.amphibian_boot.descriptio:
+1 experience point for each second of acceleration from the «Fins» ability.
+1 experience point for every second of acceleration from the «Slipping» ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.amphibian_boot.ability.sw: Increases swimming speed by %1$s%% per second of swimming. The modifier stops increasing if the swimming duration exceeds %2$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.amphibian_boot.ability.sl: Increases movement speed in the rain by %1$s%% per second of movement. The modifier stops increasing if the duration of movement in the rain exceeds %2$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.amphibian_boot.ability.gi: With a %1$s%% chance, the player may not consume an air unit while swimming or in other conditions.
relics.tooltip.relics.chorus_inhibitor.descript: +1 experience point for every 10 blocks to the teleportation point from the «Teleportation Control» ability.
Using a chorus fruit teleports the wearer to a block along the line of sight within %1$s blocks, then goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
relics.tooltip.relics.wool_mitten.description: +1 experience point for every 5 units of size when hit by a snowball from the ability «Mold».
Collecting snow with an empty hand using RMB gradually forms special hardened snowballs, up to a size of %1$s units. Hitting a target with such a snowball deals %2$s damage, stuns for %3$s seconds, and freezes the target for %3$s per unit of snowball size. Holding a snowball in the inventory without the relic equipped also freezes the player.
relics.tooltip.relics.roller_skates.description: +1 experience point for each second of acceleration from the ability «Acceleration».
relics.tooltip.relics.roller_skates.ability.ska: Increases movement speed by %1$s%% per second of movement. The modifier stops increasing if the movement duration exceeds %2$s seconds. All blocks also become slippery for the wearer.
relics.tooltip.relics.space_dissector.descripti: +1 experience point for each created portal if there is no existing one
relics.tooltip.relics.space_dissector.ability.d: Holding RMB creates a portal at a point along the line of sight. Releasing RMB within a distance of %1$s blocks creates a second portal in the same way, linking it to the first. When a living entity approaches a portal, it is teleported to the linked portal. Portals do not function if impassable blocks are in their way. After %2$s seconds, the portals close and disappear.
relics.tooltip.relics.phantom_boot.description: Condenses matter beneath the relic owner's feet, creating a path through any terrain, even where no solid ground exists.
relics.tooltip.relics.phantom_boot.ability.brid: Creates a temporary phantom bridge beneath the player's feet that any relic owner can walk on. If the player stands still on the bridge for more than %1$s seconds, they will fall through and cannot get back up until they reach solid ground. While sneaking, the player is forced to fall through the phantom bridge blocks.
relics.tooltip.relics.phantom_boot.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points with a 10%% chance each time a bridge is created using the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.springy_boot.description: Grants the relic owner special elasticity, allowing them to bounce off any solid surface.
relics.tooltip.relics.springy_boot.ability.boun: Increases the elasticity of all blocks by %1$s%% compared to slime blocks, enabling the player to bounce off them upon landing. When activated on the ground, it launches the player into the air.
relics.tooltip.relics.springy_boot.leveling_sou: +%1$s experience points for each bounce off a surface using the %2$s ability.
relics.tooltip.relics.leveling_source.generic.s: Each time any relic in the inventory gains experience, regardless of the method, %1$s%% of that experience is also gained by this relic.
relics.command.relics.base.not_relic: The item in hand must be a relic!
relics.info.relics.researching.wrong_container: Working with the relic in this inventory is not possible. Move item to the player's main inventory and try again.

repurposed_structures.Find an End themed Ruined Portal!: Find an End themed Ruined Portal!

repurposed_structures.repurposed_structures.midnightconfig.bla: RS Loottables That Disables Importing Modded Items
repurposed_structures.repurposed_structures.midnightconfig.imp:
Adds modded loot from vanilla structure's loot tables and
injects them into Repurposed Structure's loot tables.
Example: Snowy Pyramid gets all modded items that
vanilla Desert Temple can have
repurposed_structures.repurposed_structures.midnightconfig.bla:
Add the identifiers for Repurposed Structures's loot table you
want to turn off the automatic modded item importing code for.
Separate multiple entries with a comma.
Example:
"repurposed_structures:chests/mansions/birch,
repurposed_structures:chests/mineshafts/jungle"

rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.crafting_card.header: This item can be used for crafting. It stores ingredients and end result for a recipe
rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.information_screen.h: Place this block on a powercell to display information about that cell. Right click with a wrench to change modes
rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.information_screen.g: This block can also display power information about any block that supports RF/FE
rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.machine_infuser.head: With this machine you can improve most other machines in RFTools in various ways. This needs dimensional shards
rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.filter_module.header: This filter module is used in various situations (XNet, storage, builder, crafter, ...). It can make sure the block only accepts certain items

rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.manual.header: This guide is the manual for all RFTools based technology mods

rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.tablet_filled.gold: Tablet containing information: right click for information gui, sneak right click for tablet gui

rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.smartwrench_select.h: General Smart Wrench. Right-click on air to change mode
rftoolsbase.message.rftoolsbase.smartwrench_select.g: Use as a block selector: sneak-right-click to select master block and right-click to associate blocks with master

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.analog.header: The Analog can do simple 'calculations' on an input redstone signal based on two side inputs
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.counter.header: The Counter can count redstone pulses upto a specified maximum (and when maximum is reached send out a redstone pulse on its own)
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.digit.header: The Digit block shows the strength of the input redstone signal
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.invchecker.header: The Inventory Checker can check for the presence of items in an inventory and send out a redstone signal
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.sensor.header: The Sensor can detect various things like mobs, players, blocks, fluids, and crop growth and send out a redstone signal under some conditions
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.sequencer.header: The Sequencer can send out series of redstone pulses given certain input signals. The sequences can optionally be repeated
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.logic.header: The Logic block can combine three input signals into one output signal given a truth table
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.timer.header: The Timer block can send out timed redstone pulses
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.wire.header: The Wire block is a very simple lag-free redstone wire. Can only do straight lines

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.tablet_screen.gol: Tablet containing a screen: right click for screen, sneak right click for tablet gui
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.screen_link.heade: This item can be used to refer to a screen in the world and then inserted in the Tablet

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.text_module.heade: A module for a Screen that shows some text
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.counter_module.he: A module for a Screen to display the current count of a Counter block

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.energy_module.hea: A module for a Screen that allows you to display the energy status of a block
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.energy_module.gol: Sneak right-click on a machine to set the target for this energy module

Sneak right-click on an inventory to set the target for this inventory module
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.machineinformatio: A module for a Screen that allows you to monitor a machine (for machines that support this system)

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.redstone_module.h: A module for a Screen that allows you display the status of a redstone channel
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.redstone_module.g: Sneak right-click on a redstone transmitter or receiver to set the channel for this module. Or else sneak right-click on the side of any block to monitor the redstone output on that side
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.charged_porter.he: This RF/charged item allows you to teleport to a previously set matter receiver. Sneak-right clickon a receiver to set the destination. Right click to perform the teleport
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.advanced_charged_: This RF/charged item allows you to teleport to a previously set matter receiver. Sneak-right clickon a receiver to set the destination. Right click to perform the teleport
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.syringe.header: The Syringe can be used on mobs to capture their essence. This can then be used in the Spawner. Note that the Syringe needs to be full
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.dialing_device.he: With the dialing device you can 'dial-up' any nearby matter transmitter to any matter receiver in the Minecraft universe. This requires power. If a Destination Analyzer is adjacent to this block you will also be able to check if the destination has enough power to be safe
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.matter_receiver.h: If you place this block anywhere in the world then you can dial to it using a Dialing Device. Before teleporting to this block make sure to give it power!
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.matter_transmitte: If you place this block near a Dialing Device then you can dial it to a Matter Receiver. Make sure to give it sufficient power! Use a Destination Analyzer adjacent to this block to check destination status (red is bad, green ok, yellow is unknown). Use a  Matter Booster adjacent to this block to be able to teleport to unpowered receivers
Infusing bonus: reduced power consumption and increased teleportation speed
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.simple_dialer.hea: When this block gets a redstone signal it dials or interrupts a transmitter. Sneak-right click with this block on a transmitter or dialed receiver to set the destination
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.matter_beamer.hea: This block converts matter into a beam of energy. It can then send that beam to a connected spawner. Connect by using a wrench
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.matter_beamer.gol: Infusing bonus: reduced power usage increased speed and less material needed
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.spawner.header: This block can spawn creatures. It needs a syringe of the appropriate type, RF power and also it needs beams of energized matter
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.screen.header: This is a modular screen. As such it doesn't show anything. You must insert modules to control what you can see. This screen cannot be directly powered. It has to be remotely powered by a nearby Screen Controller
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.creative_screen.h: This is a modular screen. As such it doesn't show anything. You must insert modules to control what you can see. This creative version of the normal screen requires no power
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.screen_controller: Before screens can work they need to get power from this controller. Even a screen that has only modules that require no power will need to have a controller. One controller can power many screens as long as they are in range
Infusing bonus: increased range for screens

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.glowing_module.he: This module gives glowing enchantment when used in the environmental controller
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.luck_module.heade: This module gives luck bonus when used in the environmental controller
rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.noteleport_module: This module prevents shulkers and enderman from teleporting when used in the environmental controller

rftoolsutility.message.rftoolsutility.poison_module.hea: This module gives poison when used in the environmental controller

sodium.sodium.options.view_distance.tooltip: The render distance controls how far away terrain will be rendered. Shorter distances mean that less terrain will be rendered, improving frame rates.
sodium.sodium.options.simulation_distance.toolt: The simulation distance controls how far away terrain and entities will be loaded and ticked. Shorter distances can reduce the internal server's load and may improve frame rates.
sodium.sodium.options.brightness.tooltip: Controls the minimum brightness in the world. When increased, darker areas of the world will appear brighter. This does not affect the brightness of already well-lit areas.
sodium.sodium.options.gui_scale.tooltip: Sets the maximum scale factor to be used for the user interface. If "auto" is used, then the largest scale factor will always be used.
sodium.sodium.options.fullscreen.tooltip: If enabled, the game will display in full-screen (if supported).
sodium.sodium.options.fullscreen_resolution.too:
The monitor resolution and refresh rate to be used when in fullscreen mode. Changing this option may interfere with other applications and cause a delay when switching between applications.

This is only supported on the Windows operating system.
sodium.sodium.options.v_sync.tooltip: If enabled, the game's frame rate will be synchronized to the monitor's refresh rate, making for a generally smoother experience at the expense of overall input latency. This setting might reduce performance if your system is too slow.
sodium.sodium.options.fps_limit.tooltip: Limits the maximum number of frames per second. This can help reduce battery usage and system load when multi-tasking. If VSync is enabled, this option will be ignored unless it is lower than your display's refresh rate.
sodium.sodium.options.view_bobbing.tooltip: If enabled, the player's view will sway and bob when moving around. Players who experience motion sickness while playing may benefit from disabling this.
sodium.sodium.options.attack_indicator.tooltip: Controls where the Attack Indicator is displayed on screen.
sodium.sodium.options.autosave_indicator.toolti: If enabled, an indicator will be shown when the game is saving the world to disk.
sodium.sodium.options.graphics_quality.tooltip: The default graphics quality controls some legacy options and is necessary for mod compatibility. If the options below are left to "Default", they will use this setting.
sodium.sodium.options.clouds_quality.tooltip: The quality level used for rendering clouds in the sky. Even though the options are labeled "Fast" and "Fancy", the effect on performance is negligible.
sodium.sodium.options.weather_quality.tooltip: Controls the distance that weather effects, such as rain and snow, will be rendered.
sodium.sodium.options.leaves_quality.name: Leaves
sodium.sodium.options.leaves_quality.tooltip: Controls whether leaves will be rendered as transparent (fancy) or opaque (fast).
sodium.sodium.options.particle_quality.tooltip: Controls the maximum number of particles which can be present on screen at any one time.
sodium.sodium.options.smooth_lighting.tooltip: Enables the smooth lighting and shading of blocks in the world. This can very slightly increase the amount of time it takes to load or update a chunk, but it doesn't affect frame rates.
sodium.sodium.options.biome_blend.tooltip: The distance (in blocks) which biome colors are smoothly blended across. Using higher values will greatly increase the amount of time it takes to load or update chunks, for diminishing improvements in quality.
sodium.sodium.options.entity_distance.tooltip: The render distance multiplier used by entity rendering. Smaller values decrease, and larger values increase, the maximum distance at which entities will be rendered.
sodium.sodium.options.entity_shadows.tooltip: If enabled, basic shadows will be rendered beneath mobs and other entities.
sodium.sodium.options.vignette.name: Vignette
sodium.sodium.options.vignette.tooltip: If enabled, a vignette effect will be applied when the player is in darker areas, which makes the overall image darker and more dramatic.
sodium.sodium.options.mipmap_levels.tooltip: Controls the number of mipmaps which will be used for block model textures. Higher values provide better rendering of blocks in the distance, but could adversely affect performance with resource packs that use many animated textures.
sodium.sodium.options.use_block_face_culling.to: If enabled, only the faces of blocks which are facing the camera will be submitted for rendering. This can eliminate a large number of block faces very early in the rendering process, which greatly improves rendering performance. Some resource packs may have issues with this option, so try disabling it if you're seeing holes in blocks.
sodium.sodium.options.use_fog_occlusion.name: Use Fog Occlusion
sodium.sodium.options.use_fog_occlusion.tooltip: If enabled, chunks which are determined to be fully hidden by fog effects will not be rendered, helping to improve performance. The improvement can be more dramatic when fog effects are heavier (such as while underwater), but it may cause undesirable visual artifacts between the sky and fog in some scenarios.
sodium.sodium.options.use_entity_culling.name: Use Entity Culling
sodium.sodium.options.use_entity_culling.toolti: If enabled, entities which are within the camera viewport, but not inside of a visible chunk, will be skipped during rendering. This optimization uses the visibility data which already exists for chunk rendering and does not add overhead.
sodium.sodium.options.animate_only_visible_text: If enabled, only the animated textures which are determined to be visible in the current image will be updated. This can provide a significant performance improvement on some hardware, especially with heavier resource packs. If you experience issues with some textures not being animated, try disabling this option.
sodium.sodium.options.cpu_render_ahead_limit.to: For debugging only. Specifies the maximum number of frames which can be in-flight to the GPU. Changing this value is not recommended, as very low or high values may create frame rate instability.
sodium.sodium.options.use_persistent_mapping.to:
For debugging only. If enabled, persistent memory mappings will be used for the staging buffer so that unnecessary memory copies can be avoided. Disabling this can be useful for narrowing down the cause of graphical corruption.

Requires OpenGL 4.4 or ARB_buffer_storage.
sodium.sodium.options.chunk_update_threads.name: Chunk Update Threads
sodium.sodium.options.chunk_update_threads.tool: Specifies the number of threads to use for chunk building and sorting. Using more threads can speed up chunk loading and update speed, but may negatively impact frame times. The default value is usually good enough for all situations.
sodium.sodium.options.always_defer_chunk_update: If enabled, rendering will never wait for chunk updates to finish, even if they are important. This can greatly improve frame rates in some scenarios, but it may create significant visual lag where blocks take a while to appear or disappear.
sodium.sodium.options.use_no_error_context.name: Use No Error Context
sodium.sodium.options.use_no_error_context.tool: When enabled, the OpenGL context will be created with error checking disabled. This slightly improves rendering performance, but it can make debugging sudden unexplained crashes much harder.
sodium.sodium.console.game_restart: The game must be restarted to apply one or more video settings!
sodium.sodium.console.broken_nvidia_driver:
Your NVIDIA graphics drivers are out of date!

  * Please update your graphics drivers to the latest version (version 536.23 or newer.)

waystones.waystones.configuration.worldGen.chunksB: Approximate chunk distance between wild waystones being generated. Set to 0 to disable generation.

The template to use when generating new names. Supported placeholders are {Biome} (english biome name) and {MrPork} (the default name generator).
These names will be used for the PRESET name generation mode. See the nameGenerationMode option for more info.
waystones.waystones.configuration.worldGen.spawnIn: Set to REGULAR to have waystones spawn in some villages. Set to FREQUENT to have waystones spawn in most villages. Set to DISABLED to disable waystone generation in villages. Waystones will only spawn in vanilla or supported villages.
